2603.19608.title: FB-CLIP: Fine-Grained Zero-Shot Anomaly Detection with Foreground-Background Disentanglement
2603.19608.paper_summary: Fine-grained anomaly detection is crucial in industrial and medical applications, but labeled anomalies are often scarce, making zero-shot detection challenging. While vision-language models like CLIP offer promising solutions, they struggle with foreground-background feature entanglement and coarse textual semantics. We propose FB-CLIP, a framework that enhances anomaly localization via multi-strategy textual representations and foreground-background separation. In the textual modality, it combines End-of-Text features, global-pooled representations, and attention-weighted token features for richer semantic cues. In the visual modality, multi-view soft separation along identity, semantic, and spatial dimensions, together with background suppression, reduces interference and improves discriminability. Semantic Consistency Regularization (SCR) aligns image features with normal and abnormal textual prototypes, suppressing uncertain matches and enlarging semantic gaps. Experiments show that FB-CLIP effectively distinguishes anomalies from complex backgrounds, achieving accurate fine-grained anomaly detection and localization under zero-shot settings.
2603.19608.paper_summary_zh: 細粒度異常檢測在工業和醫療應用中至關重要，但標記的異常通常稀缺，這使得零樣本檢測變得具有挑戰性。雖然像 CLIP 這樣的視覺-語言模型提供了有希望的解決方案，但它們在前景-背景特徵糾纏和粗略文本語義方面存在困難。我們提出了 FB-CLIP，一個通過多策略文本表示和前景-背景分離來增強異常定位的框架。在文本模態中，它結合了結束文本特徵、全局池化表示和注意力加權的標記特徵，以提供更豐富的語義線索。在視覺模態中，沿著身份、語義和空間維度的多視角軟分離，加上背景抑制，減少了干擾並提高了可辨識性。語義一致性正則化 (SCR) 將圖像特徵與正常和異常文本原型對齊，抑制不確定的匹配並擴大語義差距。實驗表明，FB-CLIP 能有效區分複雜背景中的異常，在零樣本設置下實現準確的細粒度異常檢測和定位。
2603.19608.author: Ming Hu et.al.
2603.19608.authors: Ming Hu, Yongsheng Huo, Mingyu Dou, Jianfu Yin, Peng Zhao, Yao Wang, Cong Hu, Bingliang Hu, Quan Wang
